title: haplopappus eriopodus
intro: Haplopappus eriopodus is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is commonly found in the western United States. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids, and it has been employed in various herbal remedies. The health benefits of Haplopappus eriopodus include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. Herbal preparations of Haplopappus eriopodus include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
